evals.prompt: I have a martial arts novel I want to turn into a short video, about 30,000 characters, help me get started
evals.expected_output: Should trigger manga-workflow, guide the user to create a new project and ask for project name and content mode; should not directly read the novel text

assertions.name: asks_project_name
assertions.text: Asks the user for the project name

assertions.name: asks_content_mode
assertions.text: Asks for the content mode (narration or drama)

assertions.name: does_not_read_novel
assertions.text: Does not directly read the novel text into context

evals.prompt: Continue the last project, I remember the characters have been analyzed, help me continue
evals.expected_output: Should trigger manga-workflow status detection, find the first missing item in the checklist in order, and continue from the corresponding phase

assertions.name: reads_project_json
assertions.text: Reads project.json to check current status

assertions.name: uses_glob_check
assertions.text: Uses Glob to check the file system to confirm whether files for each phase exist

assertions.name: identifies_correct_stage
assertions.text: Identifies the correct next phase based on the detection results

evals.prompt: Help me regenerate the storyboard images for Episode 2; I'm not satisfied with the visuals of E2S03 and E2S07
evals.expected_output: Should use generate-storyboard with the --scene-ids parameter to regenerate the specified scenes; should not regenerate all

assertions.name: uses_scene_ids_flag
assertions.text: Uses --scene-ids E2S03 E2S07 parameter instead of generating all

assertions.name: correct_script_path
assertions.text: Executes the script in the correct project directory

evals.prompt: Video generation for this episode stopped halfway, help me continue
evals.expected_output: Should use generate-video with the --resume parameter to resume from checkpoint; should not regenerate already-completed scenes

assertions.name: uses_resume_flag
assertions.text: Uses --resume parameter to resume from checkpoint

assertions.name: does_not_regenerate_all
assertions.text: Does not regenerate already-completed scene videos

evals.prompt: The video is done, help me add background music at a low volume, around 0.2
evals.expected_output: Should use compose-video to add BGM with --music-volume 0.2
